original_query: select 100.00 * sum(case when p_type like 'PROMO%' then l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) else 0 end) / sum(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) as promo_revenue from lineitem, part where l_partkey = p_partkey and l_shipdate >= date '1995-05-01' and l_shipdate < date '1995-05-01' + interval '1' month;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 100.00 * SUM(promo_val) / SUM(total_val) AS promo_revenue
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE WHEN p.p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) ELSE 0 END AS promo_val,
        l.l_extendedprice * (1 - l.l_discount) AS total_val
    FROM lineitem l
    JOIN part p ON l.l_partkey = p.p_partkey
    WHERE l.l_shipdate >= DATE '1995-05-01'
    AND l.l_shipdate < DATE '1995-06-01'
) AS subquery;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Precompute the common expression l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) once in a subquery to avoid redundant calculations
Use explicit JOIN syntax instead of implicit comma-separated joins for better readability and maintainability
Use table aliases to improve query readability and clarity
